title: Gemini
html:
Google's flagship AI assistant — one of the seven LLMs that Rankett's AI visibility engine tracks for share-of-voice. Cited 28 times across the corpus, almost entirely in rankett / insight ai / aeo agency context. Functions in Yahir's product thinking as "the Google answer surface" — the LLM most likely to be the new search default for queries that previously hit google.com.

TL;DR

  • Tracked alongside ChatGPT, Claude, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek in rankett's seven-LLM coverage.
  • Featured in every Rankett pitch artifact: 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide, 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep gdocs, 2026 01 11 rankett meetup prep revised, 2026 01 11 rankett meetup prep gdocs, 2026 01 05 rankett infrastructure.
  • The Google AI Overviews / Gemini relationship is strategically distinct in Rankett's framing — Overviews is the SERP-embedded answer; Gemini is the standalone conversational product. Both surface in Google's distribution but require different optimization tactics.
  • Adjacent to the AI search thesis formed across 2022–2026 — Gemini is the Google version of the post-Google search world.
  • Used both as target surface (for AEO clients) and research tool (Yahir uses Gemini in his own workflow — see 2025 12 09 screenshot 2025 12 09 at 12 23 55 pm 2ca27c3d, 2026 02 03 emily spanish assignment).

Key facts

  • Seven-LLM tracking matrix. Every Rankett pitch lists Gemini as the third pillar (after ChatGPT and Claude).
  • Distinct from Google AI Overviews. 2025 10 08 website and automations for local besides explicitly separates Gemini from Overviews — different ranking signals, different optimization moves.
  • Showed up in agency pitches by Dec 2025. 2025 12 01 screenshot 2025 12 01 at 3 08 39 pm c31bd4ff, 2025 12 02 screenshot 2025 12 02 at 1 20 27 am e6d07ca3, 2025 12 09 screenshot 2025 12 09 at 12 23 55 pm 2ca27c3d, 2025 12 09 screenshot 2025 12 09 at 5 57 47 pm b4eca770 all reference it.
  • Used in Yahir's own homework loops. 2026 02 03 emily spanish assignment has Yahir using Gemini for translation help.
  • Origin in Yahir's vault. Earliest mention 2024 12 04 requirements document 2 — already on his radar during CS coursework.
